description: Recto: Fragment of a letter in Judaeo-Arabic to al-Shaykh al-Muhadhdhab, perhaps begging for charity. Mentions necessity/want (al-ḍurūra) several times and concludes with, "I have no one who bestows favor (muḥsin mutafaḍḍil) like you." Verso: Lists of names in Arabic. Musā... Mufaḍḍal... ʿAbdallāh... Ibrahīm Shammūl (?)... Sulaymān Ibn [ ]... Tawfīq Ibn Saʿīd.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בכיא פריז.
